name: 私生子vs嫡子（兄弟反目）
name_en: Illegitimate Son vs Legitimate Son (Brothers Turned Enemies)
description: 蘇雲與容王的關係是豪門恩怨的經典模式。一個在陽光下長大，一個在陰影中隱忍，身份不公導致的仇恨是不可調和的核心衝突。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: I considered you a brother. Who wants to be your brother?... You've been the lofty young master of the Rome family for so many years. And what about me?... Just because I'm a bastard, child.
examples.context: 蘇雲與容王的關係是豪門恩怨的經典模式。一個在陽光下長大，一個在陰影中隱忍，身份不公導致的仇恨是不可調和的核心衝突。
